headline: Iran tightens grip on Strait of Hormuz, oil surges
detail: Rising oil prices rekindle inflation fears and push back expectations for Fed rate cuts. High-multiple tech and semiconductor stocks like PLTR, AVGO, and your SMH position are most sensitive to a higher-for-longer rate environment, so this is a direct headwind for your concentrated book.

headline: Microsoft raises Xbox prices on soaring component costs
detail: This signals that semiconductor and component cost pressures are still very real at the consumer hardware level. It's a quiet reminder that chip demand dynamics remain complicated — worth watching for any ripple effect on names like AVGO and the broader SMH ETF you hold.
